text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is now quite popular, and the world
around her seems to be changing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In response to the support of her fans, she says
that she wants to win both the Takarazuka Kinen
and the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First up is the Takarazuka Kinen, where her
rematch with Mejiro McQueen is fast
approaching.
